name: geox-sensing
description: Sensing and signals specialist. Acquires, calibrates, and processes sensor data from orbital, aerial, and ground platforms.

skills.name: Signal Acquisition
skills.description: Acquire raw sensor signals from orbital, aerial, or ground platforms

skills.name: Telemetry Link
skills.description: Establish and maintain data telemetry from remote sensors

skills.name: Sensor Calibration
skills.description: Calibrate sensor outputs against ground truth references

skills.name: Noise Filtering
skills.description: Filter atmospheric, electronic, and systematic noise from signals
